label: K-means on regions
script: Now use k-means clustering to automatically find the K primary colors (5, 7, or 9) from only the new set of regions.

label: Swatch region matching
script: Now we'll match each region to its nearest swatch.
note: Zoom to image to see all pairs

label: Region-swatch match
script: Swatches have letters, Regions have numbers.
note: Zoom in to see one pair

label: Roll-over regions
script: Roll over a region to see its matched swatch.
note: Zoom out to show regions and swatches

label: Roll-over swatches
script: Roll over a swatch to see its matched region.
note: Zoom out to show regions and swatches
